# OSLAccessorUPP

**Type Alias**

Defines a data type for the universal procedure pointer for the `OSLAccessorProcPtr` callback function pointer.

## Declaration

```swift
typealias OSLAccessorUPP = OSLAccessorProcPtr
```

## Discussion

For a description of an object accessor callback function, see [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/coreservices/oslaccessorprocptr].
title: OSLAccessorUPP
